decisions.title: select frontend framework for customer analytics dashboard rebuild
decisions.rationale: Two positions from different stakeholders captured across separate documents. Maya (Product Eng) advocates SvelteKit for bundle size and DX; Chris (DevOps) prefers React due to existing Kubernetes operator tooling. Decision deferred to Q2.
evidence: SvelteKit: smaller bundle, faster initial load, simpler component model (Q1 planning notes, 2025-01-15)
SvelteKit SSR requires new Kubernetes configuration not budgeted for Q1; React has mature operator tooling already in cluster (Q1 retro, 2025-03-28)
